title: gratiola quartermaniae
intro: Gratiola quartermaniae, also known as American coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Gratiola quartermaniae include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Gratiola quartermaniae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
